# Hodgkin-Huxley 1952

Voltage-clamp recordings from squid giant axon. Four papers in J. Physiol.
culminating in the quantitative model of the action potential driven by
time- and voltage-dependent sodium and potassium conductances.

The `m^3 h` gating for sodium and `n^4` gating for potassium were chosen
empirically to fit the data; the structural interpretation came decades
later with the cloning of the Shaker channel.
